title: Israel Says Michigan Synagogue Attacker’s Brother Was a Hezbollah Commander
summary_full: The Israeli military said it killed the brother of Ayman Mohamad Ghazali in an airstrike in Lebanon a week before the attack on the synagogue.
summary_public: The Israeli military said it killed the brother of Ayman Mohamad Ghazali in an airstrike in Lebanon a week before the attack on the synagogue.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: killed the brother of Ayman Mohamad Ghazali
